name: Raisin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the raisins and apple juice. Bring to a boil and cool.
2. In a large bowl, mix the flour, baking soda, baking powder, ground cinnamon, egg, and vegetable oil together until well combined.
3. Add the cooled raisin mixture and stir thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Spread the batter into a lightly oiled 8-inch square pan.
5. Sprinkle grated orange rind over the top of the batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
7. Allow the bars to cool in the pan on a wire rack for about 10 minutes before cutting into bars.
1/16 recipe - 76 calories, 1 bread exchange, 14 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 2 grams fat, 47 mg sodium, 109 mg potassium, 17 mg cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
